$comment: Editorial input for scripts/pylon/migrate-articles.ts. sourcePath is relative to astro-docs/. collectionId is the target Pylon collection (currently the 'Nx Knowledge Base' collection). Set weight to override PYLON_DEFAULT_SEARCH_WEIGHT for a single article. extraRedirects covers section index pages when a whole section moves. Pilot batch below; graph-tag articles (feature-based-testing, identify-dependencies-between-folders) are excluded pending a screenshot-vs-keep decision.
